reference: Hi, thank you for asking. I really appreciate your concern. I would like to say that if all the family members have such rashes, then this could be due to some common allergens that could be the reason. This may be a food allergy or something that has been used by all the family members. This may be treated with the medication Levocetirizine. Have a nice day.
text: Hi, thank you for asking. I really appreciate your concern. I would like to say that if all the family members have such rashes, then this could be due to some common allergen that could be the reason. This may be a food allergy, something that has been used by all the family members. This may be treated with the medication Levosuprasin. Have a nice day.
